author.name: AI Model Database — Compare 40+ AI Models

entry.title: Every Major AI Model Compared: 2025 Landscape | gpt0x.com
entry.summary: A comprehensive comparison of every major AI model in 2025 — GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, Gemini 1.5, Llama 3.1, Mistral, and more. Capabilities, pricing, and use cases.

entry.title: Open Source vs Closed Source AI: The Real Trade-offs | gpt0x.com
entry.summary: An honest comparison of open-source and closed-source AI models. Performance, cost, privacy, customization, and when to choose each.
